lines.gurmukhi: ਧੰਧੈ ਧਾਵਤ ਜਗੁ ਬਾਧਿਆ ਨਾ ਬੂਝੈ ਵੀਚਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: dhandhai dhaavat jag baadhiaa naa boojhai veechaar |
lines.english: The world is chasing after worldly affairs; caught and bound, it does not understand contemplative meditation.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੰਮਣ ਮਰਣੁ ਵਿਸਾਰਿਆ ਮਨਮੁਖ ਮੁਗਧੁ ਗਵਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: jaman maran visaariaa manamukh mugadh gavaar |
lines.english: The foolish, ignorant, self-willed manmukh has forgotten birth and death.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੂਹਟੁ ਪਿੰਜਰਿ ਪ੍ਰੇਮ ਕੈ ਬੋਲੈ ਬੋਲਣਹਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: soohatt pinjar prem kai bolai bolanahaar |
lines.english: In the cage of divine love, the parrot, speaks.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਿ ਰਾਖੇ ਸੇ ਉਬਰੇ ਸਚਾ ਸਬਦੁ ਵੀਚਾਰਿ ॥੭॥
lines.translit: gur raakhe se ubare sachaa sabad veechaar |7|
lines.english: Those whom the Guru has protected are saved, contemplating the True Word of the Shabad. ||7||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਿ ਮਿਲਿਐ ਖਸਮੁ ਪਛਾਣੀਐ ਕਹੁ ਨਾਨਕ ਮੋਖ ਦੁਆਰੁ ॥੮॥੨॥
lines.translit: gur miliai khasam pachhaaneeai kahu naanak mokh duaar |8|2|
lines.english: Meeting with the Guru, one recognizes his Lord and Master; says Nanak, he finds the gate of liberation. ||8||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚੁ ਚੁਗੈ ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤੁ ਪੀਐ ਉਡੈ ਤ ਏਕਾ ਵਾਰ ॥
lines.translit: sach chugai amrit peeai uddai ta ekaa vaar |
lines.english: It pecks at the Truth, and drinks in the Ambrosial Nectar; it flies away, only once.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਾਰੂ ਮਹਲਾ ੧ ॥
lines.translit: maaroo mahalaa 1 |
lines.english: Maaroo, First Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸ ਕੈ ਡਰਿ ਭੈ ਭਾਗੀਐ ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤੁ ਤਾ ਕੋ ਨਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: jis kai ddar bhai bhaageeai amrit taa ko naau |
lines.english: Through the Fear of God, fear runs away; His Name is Ambrosial Nectar.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਬਦਿ ਮਰੈ ਤਾ ਮਾਰਿ ਮਰੁ ਭਾਗੋ ਕਿਸੁ ਪਹਿ ਜਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: sabad marai taa maar mar bhaago kis peh jaau |
lines.english: One who dies in the Word of the Shabad conquers death; otherwise, where can you run?

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਾਰਹਿ ਰਾਖਹਿ ਏਕੁ ਤੂ ਬੀਜਉ ਨਾਹੀ ਥਾਉ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: maareh raakheh ek too beejau naahee thaau |1|
lines.english: You alone kill and protect; except for You, there is no place at all. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਾਬਾ ਮੈ ਕੁਚੀਲੁ ਕਾਚਉ ਮਤਿਹੀਨ ॥
lines.translit: baabaa mai kucheel kaachau matiheen |
lines.english: O Baba, I am filthy, shallow and totally without understanding.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਵਗਣਿ ਸੁਭਰ ਗੁਣ ਨਹੀ ਬਿਨੁ ਗੁਣ ਕਿਉ ਘਰਿ ਜਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: avagan subhar gun nahee bin gun kiau ghar jaau |
lines.english: I am full of faults, and I have no virtue at all. Without virtues, how can I go home?

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਮ ਬਿਨਾ ਕੋ ਕਛੁ ਨਹੀ ਗੁਰਿ ਪੂਰੈ ਪੂਰੀ ਮਤਿ ਕੀਨ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: naam binaa ko kachh nahee gur poorai pooree mat keen |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Without the Naam, no one is anything; the Perfect Guru has made my intellect perfect. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨ ਕੈ ਨਾਮੁ ਨ ਮਨਿ ਵਸੈ ਸੇ ਬਾਧੇ ਦੂਖ ਸਹਾਹਿ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: jin kai naam na man vasai se baadhe dookh sahaeh |2|
lines.english: Those whose minds are not filled with the Naam are bound and gagged, and suffer in pain. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਹਜਿ ਸਬਦਿ ਸੁਖੁ ਊਪਜੈ ਬਿਨੁ ਭਾਗਾ ਧਨੁ ਨਾਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: sehaj sabad sukh aoopajai bin bhaagaa dhan naeh |
lines.english: Through the Word of the Shabad, intuitive peace wells up; without good destiny, the wealth is not obtained.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨੀ ਨਾਮੁ ਵਿਸਾਰਿਆ ਸੇ ਕਿਤੁ ਆਏ ਸੰਸਾਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: jinee naam visaariaa se kit aae sansaar |
lines.english: Those who have forgotten the Naam - why have they even come into the world?

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਗੈ ਪਾਛੈ ਸੁਖੁ ਨਹੀ ਗਾਡੇ ਲਾਦੇ ਛਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: aagai paachhai sukh nahee gaadde laade chhaar |
lines.english: Here and hereafter, they do not find any peace; they have loaded their carts with ashes.

lines.gurmukhi: ਵਿਛੁੜਿਆ ਮੇਲਾ ਨਹੀ ਦੂਖੁ ਘਣੋ ਜਮ ਦੁਆਰਿ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: vichhurriaa melaa nahee dookh ghano jam duaar |3|
lines.english: Those who are separated, do not meet with the Lord; they suffer in terrible pain at Death's Door. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਗੈ ਕਿਆ ਜਾਣਾ ਨਾਹਿ ਮੈ ਭੂਲੇ ਤੂ ਸਮਝਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: agai kiaa jaanaa naeh mai bhoole too samajhaae |
lines.english: I do not know what will happen in the world hereafter; I am so confused - please teach me, Lord!

lines.gurmukhi: ਭੂਲੇ ਮਾਰਗੁ ਜੋ ਦਸੇ ਤਿਸ ਕੈ ਲਾਗਉ ਪਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: bhoole maarag jo dase tis kai laagau paae |
lines.english: I am confused; I would fall at the feet of one who shows me the Way.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਬਿਨੁ ਦਾਤਾ ਕੋ ਨਹੀ ਕੀਮਤਿ ਕਹਣੁ ਨ ਜਾਇ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: gur bin daataa ko nahee keemat kehan na jaae |4|
lines.english: Without the Guru, there is no giver at all; His value cannot be described. ||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਜਨੁ ਦੇਖਾ ਤਾ ਗਲਿ ਮਿਲਾ ਸਾਚੁ ਪਠਾਇਓ ਲੇਖੁ ॥
lines.translit: saajan dekhaa taa gal milaa saach patthaaeo lekh |
lines.english: If I see my friend, then I will embrace Him; I have sent Him the letter of Truth.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੁਖਿ ਧਿਮਾਣੈ ਧਨ ਖੜੀ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਆਖੀ ਦੇਖੁ ॥
lines.translit: mukh dhimaanai dhan kharree guramukh aakhee dekh |
lines.english: His soul-bride stands waiting expectantly; as Gurmukh, I see Him with my eyes.

lines.gurmukhi: ਭੂਖ ਪਿਆਸੋ ਜੇ ਭਵੈ ਕਿਆ ਤਿਸੁ ਮਾਗਉ ਦੇਇ ॥
lines.translit: bhookh piaaso je bhavai kiaa tis maagau dee |
lines.english: One who is wandering hungry and thirsty - what can he give, and what can anyone ask from him?

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੁਧੁ ਭਾਵੈ ਤੂ ਮਨਿ ਵਸਹਿ ਨਦਰੀ ਕਰਮਿ ਵਿਸੇਖੁ ॥੫॥
lines.translit: tudh bhaavai too man vaseh nadaree karam visekh |5|
lines.english: By the Pleasure of Your Will, You abide in my mind, and bless me with Your Glance of Grace. ||5||

lines.gurmukhi: ਬੀਜਉ ਸੂਝੈ ਕੋ ਨਹੀ ਮਨਿ ਤਨਿ ਪੂਰਨੁ ਦੇਇ ॥
lines.translit: beejau soojhai ko nahee man tan pooran dee |
lines.english: I cannot conceive of any other, who can bless my mind and body with perfection.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨਿ ਕੀਆ ਤਿਨਿ ਦੇਖਿਆ ਆਪਿ ਵਡਾਈ ਦੇਇ ॥੬॥
lines.translit: jin keea tin dekhiaa aap vaddaaee dee |6|
lines.english: The One who created me takes care of me; He Himself blesses me with glory. ||6||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਗਰੀ ਨਾਇਕੁ ਨਵਤਨੋ ਬਾਲਕੁ ਲੀਲ ਅਨੂਪੁ ॥
lines.translit: nagaree naaeik navatano baalak leel anoop |
lines.english: In the body-village is my Lord and Master, whose body is ever-new, Innocent and child-like, incomparably playful.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋ ਤਿਸੁ ਭਾਵੈ ਸੋ ਥੀਐ ਤੂ ਦੀਪਕੁ ਤੂ ਧੂਪੁ ॥੭॥
lines.translit: jo tis bhaavai so theeai too deepak too dhoop |7|
lines.english: Whatever pleases Him, happens; You are the lamp, and You are the incense. ||7||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਰਿ ਨ ਪੁਰਖੁ ਨ ਪੰਖਣੂ ਸਾਚਉ ਚਤੁਰੁ ਸਰੂਪੁ ॥
lines.translit: naar na purakh na pankhanoo saachau chatur saroop |
lines.english: He is neither a woman, nor a man, nor a bird; the True Lord is so wise and beautiful.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚੁ ਭਾਵੈ ਸਾਚਉ ਚਵੈ ਛੂਟੈ ਸੋਗ ਵਿਜੋਗੁ ॥
lines.translit: sach bhaavai saachau chavai chhoottai sog vijog |
lines.english: One who loves the Truth and speaks the Truth, escapes from the sorrow of separation.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੀਤ ਸਾਦ ਚਾਖੇ ਸੁਣੇ ਬਾਦ ਸਾਦ ਤਨਿ ਰੋਗੁ ॥
lines.translit: geet saad chaakhe sune baad saad tan rog |
lines.english: He hears the songs and tastes the flavors, but these flavors are useless and insipid, and bring only disease to the body.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਨਾਮੁ ਨ ਵੀਸਰੈ ਜੋ ਤਿਸੁ ਭਾਵੈ ਸੁ ਹੋਗੁ ॥੮॥੩॥
lines.translit: naanak naam na veesarai jo tis bhaavai su hog |8|3|
lines.english: Nanak does not forget the Naam; whatever happens is by the Lord's Will. ||8||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਚੀ ਕਾਰ ਕਮਾਵਣੀ ਹੋਰਿ ਲਾਲਚ ਬਾਦਿ ॥
lines.translit: saachee kaar kamaavanee hor laalach baad |
lines.english: Practice Truth - other greed and attachments are useless.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਾਰੂ ਮਹਲਾ ੧ ॥
lines.translit: maaroo mahalaa 1 |
lines.english: Maaroo, First Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਹੁ ਮਨੁ ਸਾਚੈ ਮੋਹਿਆ ਜਿਹਵਾ ਸਚਿ ਸਾਦਿ ॥
lines.translit: eihu man saachai mohiaa jihavaa sach saad |
lines.english: The True Lord has fascinated this mind, and my tongue enjoys the taste of Truth.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨੁ ਨਾਵੈ ਕੋ ਰਸੁ ਨਹੀ ਹੋਰਿ ਚਲਹਿ ਬਿਖੁ ਲਾਦਿ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: bin naavai ko ras nahee hor chaleh bikh laad |1|
lines.english: Without the Name, there is no juice; the others depart, loaded with poison. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਉ ਫੁਰਮਾਵਹਿ ਤਿਉ ਚਲਾ ਸਚੁ ਲਾਲ ਪਿਆਰੇ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: jiau furamaaveh tiau chalaa sach laal piaare |1| rahaau |
lines.english: I walk in harmony with Your Command, O my True, Sweet Beloved. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਐਸਾ ਲਾਲਾ ਮੇਰੇ ਲਾਲ ਕੋ ਸੁਣਿ ਖਸਮ ਹਮਾਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: aisaa laalaa mere laal ko sun khasam hamaare |
lines.english: I am such a slave of Yours, O my Beloved Lord and Master.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਨਦਿਨੁ ਲਾਲੇ ਚਾਕਰੀ ਗੋਲੇ ਸਿਰਿ ਮੀਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: anadin laale chaakaree gole sir meeraa |
lines.english: Night and day, the slave works for his overlord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਬਚਨੀ ਮਨੁ ਵੇਚਿਆ ਸਬਦਿ ਮਨੁ ਧੀਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: gur bachanee man vechiaa sabad man dheeraa |
lines.english: I have sold my mind for the Word of the Guru's Shabad; my mind is comforted and consoled by the Shabad.
